allow: Bash(python3 -c 'import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\("=== RAW CONTENT ==="\); print\(r["choices"][0]["message"]["content"]\); print\("=== USAGE ==="\); print\(r.get\("usage"\)\)')
